testsuite.name: execute_leads.LeadsTest

testcase.name: createLeadTest
testcase.system-out: Navigated to the 'Create Lead' page Entered Lead First Name: shubham_ Entered Lead Last Name: jaiswal Entered Company Name: ty_ Clicked on Save button Validating saved Last Name [jaiswal] against expected [jaiswal] Validating saved Company Name [ty_] against expected [ty_]

testsuite.system-out: Selected salutation dropdown option successfully Entered First Name: shubham_ Entered Last Name: jaiswal Switched to window with title: Administrator - Contacts - vtiger CRM 5 - Commercial Open Source CRM Switched to window with title: Context successfully shifted to Child Window Returned back to Parent Window context Validating actual First Name [shubham_] against expected [shubham_] Validating actual Last Name [jaiswal] against expected [jaiswal] Navigated to the 'Create Lead' page Entered Lead First Name: shubham_ Entered Lead Last Name: jaiswal Entered Company Name: ty_ Clicked on Save button Validating saved Last Name [jaiswal] against expected [jaiswal] Validating saved Company Name [ty_] against expected [ty_] Entered Opportunity Name: qsp_ Switched to window with title: Administrator - Opportunities - vtiger CRM 5 - Commercial Open Source CRM Switched to window with title: Context successfully shifted to Child Window (Organization Lookup) Returned back to Parent Window context Clicked on Save button Validating saved Opportunity Name [qsp_] against expected [qsp_] Navigated to 'Create Organization' layout Entered Organization Name with random suffix: awshubh_709 Clicked on Save button Validating actual Organization Name [awshubh_709] against expected [awshubh_709] Navigated to 'Create Product' page Layout Entered Product Name: parle_ Clicked on Save button Validating actual Product Name [parle_] against expected [parle_]
